name: AI provenance manifest: signature field is sha256:<hex> derived from canonical-JSON of the manifest body using project-local signing key
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/keys && echo "test-signing-key" > .claude-tdd-pro/keys/provenance.key && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --signing-key "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/keys/provenance.key" && grep -E "\"signature\":\\s*\"sha256:[a-f0-9]+\"" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
